prompt:
Reference image role: the home page prototype shows our brand visual DNA (deep ink-green palette, moss, vines, warm lantern light, paper round moon window, restrained Eastern xianxia mood). Reuse this DNA for a NEW wide background, but DO NOT copy the home page contents.

Create a wide cinematic background banner for the bottom contact / footer section of every page on "夕丰木" portfolio. 16:9 wide format.

Scene: A quiet moonlit tea room inside the tree sanctuary. Large round paper moon-window in the center-back showing pale blue-grey moonlight #b8d4e0 over distant misty mountains. A low dark wood tea table in foreground with a small celadon teapot and a single warm lantern #ddb87a glowing softly. Tendrils of incense smoke. Mossy roots framing left and right edges. Soft drifting firefly cyan glow #9CF0BD particles. Dark ink-green ambient.

Critical: keep the center-bottom of the image flat and uncluttered, ready for 4 contact cards (Email / GitHub / LinkedIn / Resume Download) to be overlaid by HTML. The visual interest sits in upper third (window + lanterns) and edges (vines + roots). Do NOT draw any cards, icons, text, buttons in the image.

Color HEX: #0B211D, #24180F, #33513A, #C0A35D warm lantern, #b8d4e0 moonlight, #9CF0BD firefly accent.

Avoid: people, faces, text, signs, browser frames, UI elements, oversaturated colors, neon, purple, red, MMORPG game UI, modern furniture, busy details that compete with overlay cards.
